title: Wildfire smoke clean-room setup
summary: Choose the room with the fewest exterior openings, close avoidable air leaks, keep indoor air clean, and monitor official evacuation guidance.
content: Choose the room with the fewest exterior openings, close avoidable air leaks, keep indoor air clean, and monitor official evacuation guidance. Use the room only while the building remains safe and authorities do not instruct evacuation. Do not use a smoke room as a reason to remain in the path of an approaching fire.
